title: Aurora, 33524, Palm Pals Indy Tiger, 5In, Soft Toy, Orange & Black
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Indy Tiger Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable tiger plush is orange and black in colour and filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling. A wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Indy Tiger is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Indy Tiger measures 13cm. Adventure awaits, and Indy is eager for the long journeys ahead. Through the jungles and over the plains, she is your best guide for travels near and far! This adventurous Indy Tiger will surely win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Say Hello to the Palm Pals Indy Tiger Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable tiger plush is orange and black in colour and filled with beans. It fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling, and it makes a wonderful gift for any occasion! Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Indy Tiger measures 13cm. Adventure awaits, and Indy is eager for the long journeys ahead. Through the jungles and over the plains, she is your best guide for travels near and far. This adventurous Indy Tiger will surely win everyone's hearts! The Indy Tiger is part of the Palm Pals Zoo collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
